title: Hanasaku Iroha: Home Sweet Home
original_title: 劇場版 花咲くいろは HOME SWEET HOME
overview: While sorting through a mess of books in the staff room, Ohana happens upon one of Denroku's log books from long ago. Within it, it recounts a story of Ohana's mom when she was the same age as her.
